{"credits": [{"type": "remediation_developer", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/35938317?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jamescalam/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jamescalam/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jamescalam/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jamescalam/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/jamescalam", "id": 35938317, "login": "jamescalam", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM1OTM4MzE3", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jamescalam/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jamescalam/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jamescalam/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jamescalam/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jamescalam/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/jamescalam", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-506", "name": "Embedded Malicious Code"}], "description": "## Impact
semantic-router versions 0.1.8 through 0.1.14 declare `litellm>=1.61.3` with no upper bound. During the window in which `litellm==1.82.8` was the latest release on PyPI, a fresh install of any affected semantic-router version could resolve to that compromised wheel.

The malicious `litellm==1.82.8` wheel ships a `litellm_init.pth` file that executes on Python interpreter startup — no import required. It collects and exfiltrates:
- Process environment variables
- AWS / GCP / Azure credentials
- SSH keys, Kubernetes configs, shell history
- Database credentials and CI/CD secrets
- Cryptocurrency wallets

Stage-two payload encrypts the collected data (AES-256 + embedded RSA pubkey) and POSTs it to `https://models.litellm.cloud/`.

See upstream: [BerriAI/litellm#24512](https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/issues/24512) and [CVE-2026-42208](https://www.cve.org/CVERecord?id=CVE-2026-42208).

## Patches
Fixed in **semantic-router 0.1.15**, which raises the floor to `litellm>=1.83.7`.

## Workarounds
If developers cannot upgrade immediately:
- Pin `litellm>=1.83.7,!=1.82.8` explicitly in their own project.
- Audit `site-packages/` for `litellm_init.pth` and delete if present.
- Rotate any credentials reachable from environments where an affected install ran.

## Credit
Upstream report and triage by the litellm maintainers — see issue [#24512](https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/issues/24512).

One caveat before publishing

CVE-2026-42208 specifically names 1.82.8. Pip's resolver picks "latest matching", so the real affected blast radius for semantic-router is users who ran pip install during the window that 1.82.8 was on PyPI — not everyone who ever installed 0.1.8–0.1.14. The advisory is still correct (an affected install could have pulled the bad wheel), but consider whether a Severity: Critical / Exploitability: time-bounded note would help downstream readers understand the exposure model.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-98x5-vq43-vc5p", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-26T20:51:20Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-98x5-vq43-vc5p", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-98x5-vq43-vc5p"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-26T20:51:20Z", "references": ["https://github.com/aurelio-labs/semantic-router/security/advisories/GHSA-98x5-vq43-vc5p", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-98x5-vq43-vc5p"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/aurelio-labs/semantic-router/security-advisories/GHSA-98x5-vq43-vc5p", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/aurelio-labs/semantic-router", "summary": "semantic-router exposed to compromised litellm wheel (CVE-2026-42208) via unbounded transitive pin", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T20:51:21Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-98x5-vq43-vc5p", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.1.15", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "semantic-router"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.1.8, < 0.1.15"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: semantic-router exposed to compromised litellm wheel (CVE-2026-42208) via unbounded transitive pin
